title: The Heist at the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum

segments.text: In 1990, two men disguised as police officers stole $500 million in art.
They gained access by claiming to investigate a disturbance.
Thirteen pieces of art, including works by Vermeer and Rembrandt, disappeared.
Despite extensive investigations, none of the artwork has been recovered.
The case remains one of the largest art thefts in history.
A heist that continues to baffle authorities and art lovers alike.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1990, art thieves stole $500 million from a museum, and the pieces are still missing. Follow for daily cold cases! 🎨
